_comment: Inputs template for the IRfinderMDL workflow. Provide ONE of `introns_tsv` (a pre-built unique-intron TSV) OR `gtf` (a reference GTF); supplying both ignores the GTF. Replace the gs://, s3://, or local paths below as appropriate.
_or_supply_a_gtf_instead: Remove introns_tsv above and uncomment gtf below if you have not pre-built introns:
_quantify_knobs: Defaults match the IRfinder-S long-read presets; tune if needed.
_resource_overrides: Increase quantify_cpu / quantify_memory_gb for large BAMs.
